_meta.note: Controlled vocabulary for the facility `o` (ownership) field in us-hospitals.json. The `od` field carries the CMS free-text ownership detail.
_meta.source: CMS Care Compare ownership, condensed to three classes

gov.label: Government
gov.def: Federal, state, county, city, or hospital-district owned.

np.label: Nonprofit
np.def: Voluntary nonprofit, including church-affiliated, private, and other nonprofit ownership.
